_metadata.title: FITS Header Keywords Research
_metadata.description: Comprehensive catalog of FITS header keywords gathered from the FITS standard, JWST MIRI Imaging schema metadata (STScI), HST, and other missions archived at MAST.

SIMPLE.description: File conforms to the FITS standard

BITPIX.description: Number of bits per data pixel. Allowed values: 8, 16, 32, 64 (integer), -32 (float), -64 (double).

PCOUNT.description: Number of bytes of supplemental data (parameter count)
PCOUNT.comment: number of parameter bytes following data table

BSCALE.description: Linear scaling factor for data values: physical = BZERO + BSCALE × array_value
BSCALE.comment: scale factor for array value to physical value

BZERO.description: Zero point offset for data values: physical = BZERO + BSCALE × array_value
BZERO.comment: physical value for an array value of zero

BUNIT.description: Physical unit of the data array values (e.g., DN, MJy/sr, electrons/s)
BUNIT.comment: physical units of the data array values

BTYPE.description: Type of data (e.g., surface brightness, flux)

BLANK.description: Value representing undefined pixels in integer arrays

DATAMAX.description: Maximum data value in the array

DATAMIN.description: Minimum data value in the array

DATE.description: File creation date in UTC (YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss format)

DATE-OBS.description: Date of observation start (UTC) in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss format
DATE-OBS.comment: UTC date at start of exposure

TIME-OBS.description: Time of observation start (UTC) in hh:mm:ss format
TIME-OBS.comment: UTC time at start of exposure

TIMESYS.description: Principal time system for time-related keywords (e.g., UTC, TDB, TT)
TIMESYS.comment: principal time system for time-related keywords

TIMEUNIT.description: Default unit for time values (e.g., 's' for seconds, 'd' for days)
TIMEUNIT.comment: Default unit applicable to all time values

MJD-OBS.description: Modified Julian Date of observation start
MJD-OBS.comment: Modified Julian Date of observation start

MJD-BEG.description: Modified Julian Date of exposure start

MJD-MID.description: Modified Julian Date of exposure midpoint
MJD-MID.comment: Modified Julian Date of exposure midpoint

MJD-AVG.description: Modified Julian Date of exposure midpoint (average)

MJD-END.description: Modified Julian Date of exposure end

EXPSTART.description: Exposure start time in Modified Julian Date

EXPMID.description: Exposure mid time in Modified Julian Date

EXPEND.description: Exposure end time in Modified Julian Date

EFFEXPTM.description: Effective exposure time corrected for dead time (seconds)

DURATION.description: Total duration of exposure: integration time × number of integrations (seconds)

XPOSURE.description: Effective exposure time in seconds (in SCI extension)

TELAPSE.description: Total elapsed exposure time in seconds

TEXPTIME.description: Total exposure time of all pointings in a resampled product (seconds)
TEXPTIME.comment: [s] Total exposure time for all pointings

NINTS.description: Number of integrations within the exposure

NFRAMES.description: Number of frames in a group

GROUPGAP.description: Number of frames skipped between groups
GROUPGAP.comment: Number of frames dropped between groups

NSAMPLES.description: Number of A/D samples per pixel read
NSAMPLES.comment: Number of A/D samples per pixel

TFRAME.description: Time between start of successive frames (seconds)

TGROUP.description: Time between start of successive groups (seconds)

READPATT.description: Readout pattern name (pre-defined NFRAMES, GROUPGAP, NRESETS combination)

EXP_TYPE.comment: Type of data in the exposure

EXPRIPAR.description: Whether exposure is PRIME, PARALLEL_COORDINATED, or PARALLEL_PURE

EXPCOUNT.description: Monotonically increasing exposure count within a visit
EXPCOUNT.comment: Running count of exposures in visit

DATAMODE.description: Post-processing method used in FPAP; maps to readout pattern

DATAPROB.description: Science telemetry indicated data problems (T or F)

DRPFRMS1.description: Number of frames dropped prior to first integration
DRPFRMS1.comment: Number of frames dropped before 1st integration

DRPFRMS3.description: Number of frames dropped between integrations
DRPFRMS3.comment: Number of frames dropped between integrations

NRESETS.description: Number of resets separating integrations within an exposure
NRESETS.comment: Number of reset frames between integrations

NRSTSTRT.description: Number of resets at the start of exposure
NRSTSTRT.comment: Number of reset frames at start of exposure

NOUTPUTS.description: Number of detector amplifier outputs used (1, 4, or 5)

FRMDIVSR.description: Frame divisor used on-board when averaging multiple frames into a group

GAINFACT.description: Data scaling factor ratio between gain=2 and nominal gain=1

ZEROFRAM.description: Zero frame was read separately (T or F)

EXSEGTOT.description: Total number of segments in a TSO single exposure

EXSEGNUM.description: Sequential segment number within a TSO single exposure

INTSTART.description: Number of the first integration in a segmented exposure product
INTSTART.comment: Starting integration number in this segment

INTEND.description: Number of the last integration in a segmented exposure product
INTEND.comment: Ending integration number in this segment

OSF_FILE.description: Observatory Status File name for this exposure

EXPSTENG.description: UTC exposure start time from engineering data stream
EXPSTENG.comment: UTC exposure start time from engineering data

ORIGIN.description: Institution that created the FITS file
ORIGIN.comment: institution responsible for creating FITS file

TELESCOP.description: Telescope used to acquire the data
TELESCOP.comment: telescope used to acquire the data

INSTRUME.description: Instrument used to acquire the data
INSTRUME.comment: Instrument used to acquire the data

DETECTOR.description: Detector used to acquire the data (e.g., MIRIMAGE, NRCA1, NIS)
DETECTOR.comment: Name of detector used to acquire the data

FILTER.description: Name of the filter element used during observation
FILTER.comment: Name of the filter element used

PUPIL.description: Pupil wheel element (e.g., CLEAR, MASKBAR, NRM, GRISMR)

GRATING.description: Grating used during observation (e.g., PRISM, G140M, G235H)

CHANNEL.description: Instrument channel (e.g., SHORT, LONG, 12, 34 for MIRI MRS)

BAND.description: Wavelength band (e.g., SHORT, MEDIUM, LONG for MIRI MRS)

MODULE.description: NIRCam module used (A, B, or MULTIPLE)

LAMP.description: Internal lamp state for all science instruments (NONE or name)

CORONMSK.description: MIRI coronagraph mask in use (e.g., 4QPM_1065, LYOT)

FXD_SLIT.description: NIRSpec fixed slit aperture name (S200A1, S200A2, S200B1, S400A1, S1600A1)

OPMODE.description: NIRSpec operating mode (MSASPEC, IFU, IMAGE, FIXEDSLIT, etc.)

CCCSTATE.description: MIRI contamination control cover state (OPEN, CLOSED, LOCKED)

DETMODE.description: Detector mode: FLUSH_MODE, TEST_PATTERN, CLOCKING, or EXPOSURE

DATAMODL.description: Type of data model (e.g., ImageModel, CubeModel)

FOCUSPOS.description: FGS focus mechanism position in millimeters (−4.0 to 4.0)

PILIN.description: Pupil imaging lens in use (T or F)

MIRNGRPS.description: MIRI flight system number of groups
MIRNGRPS.comment: MIRI flight system number of groups

MIRNFRMS.description: MIRI flight system number of frames
MIRNFRMS.comment: MIRI flight system number of frames

APERTURE.description: Aperture name used for the observation

PREIMAGE.description: Name of reference image used to measure position for this source

CMD_TSEL.description: SCE test pattern: COLUMNS, ROWS, FRAMES, or ALL

IS_IMPRT.description: Exposure flagged as a leakcal or imprint exposure

MSASTATE.description: NIRSpec MSA state: ALLOPEN, ALLCLOSED, or CONFIGURED

MSAMETID.description: Unique identifier within a visit for MSA configuration collection

MSACONID.description: Unique identifier of all MSA configurations within a visit

NRS_NORM.description: Number of normal pixels per block in NIRSpec IRS2 readout
NRS_NORM.comment: Normal pixels per block in IRS2 readout

NRS_REF.description: Number of interleaved reference pixels per block in NIRSpec IRS2 readout
NRS_REF.comment: Reference pixels per block in IRS2 readout

GWA_XTIL.description: NIRSpec grating wheel averaged X-tilt sensor value

GWA_YTIL.description: NIRSpec grating wheel averaged Y-tilt sensor value

GWA_TILT.description: NIRSpec grating wheel temperature sensor calibrated value

GWA_PXAV.description: NIRSpec grating wheel REC-averaged calibrated X-tilt value

GWA_PYAV.description: NIRSpec grating wheel REC-averaged calibrated Y-tilt value

GWA_XP_V.description: NIRSpec grating wheel X-position tilt sensor calibrated value

GWA_YP_V.description: NIRSpec grating wheel Y-position tilt sensor calibrated value

VISITGRP.description: Visit group identifier for parallel synchronization

SEQ_ID.description: Parallel sequence identifier within a group

OBSFOLDR.description: APT observation folder name containing this observation
OBSFOLDR.comment: Name of the APT observation folder

BKGDTARG.description: Exposure is flagged as a background target

IS_PSF.description: Exposure intended as a PSF reference observation

SELFREF.description: Coronagraphic observation is a self-referencing PSF survey

ENG_QUAL.description: Engineering database quality flag (OK or SUSPECT)

ENGQLPTG.description: Source and quality of spacecraft pointing keywords

TARGPROP.description: Proposer-preferred name for the target (2–31 characters)

TARGNAME.description: Target name as specified in the proposal or standard catalog name
TARGNAME.comment: Standard astronomical catalog name for target

TARGTYPE.description: Target type: FIXED, MOVING, or GENERIC

TARG_RA.description: Right ascension of the target at mid-exposure (degrees)
TARG_RA.comment: [deg] Target RA at mid time of exposure

TARG_DEC.description: Declination of the target at mid-exposure (degrees)
TARG_DEC.comment: [deg] Target Dec at mid time of exposure

RA_TARG.description: Right ascension of the target (degrees) — alternate form

DEC_TARG.description: Declination of the target (degrees) — alternate form

TARGURA.description: Target right ascension uncertainty at mid-exposure (arcsec)

MU_RA.description: Proper motion of the target in RA from APT (arcsec/year)

MU_DEC.description: Proper motion of the target in Dec from APT (arcsec/year)

MU_EPOCH.description: Epoch of the proper motion values (UT date string)
MU_EPOCH.comment: Target proper motion epoch in UT

SRCTYAPT.description: APT source type for spectroscopy: POINT, EXTENDED, or UNKNOWN

PA_APER.description: Position angle of the aperture used (degrees, east of north)

PA_V3.description: Position angle of the V3 axis (degrees, east of north)
PA_V3.comment: [deg] position angle of V3-axis of JWST

RA_V1.description: Right ascension of the telescope V1 axis (degrees)

DEC_V1.description: Declination of the telescope V1 axis (degrees)

CATEGORY.description: Program category assigned by TAC or PI

SUBCAT.description: Program sub-category (FGS, MIRI, NIRCAM, NIRISS, NIRSPEC, SC)

SCICAT.description: Science category assigned during TAC process

AUTHOR.description: Author of the data or FITS file

WCSAXES.description: Number of World Coordinate System axes
WCSAXES.comment: number of World Coordinate System axes

CRPIX1.comment: Axis 1 pixel coordinate of ref point, 1-indexed

CRPIX2.comment: Axis 2 pixel coordinate of ref point, 1-indexed

CRVAL1.description: Coordinate value at reference pixel on axis 1 (usually RA in degrees)
CRVAL1.comment: Axis 1 coordinate value at reference point

CRVAL2.description: Coordinate value at reference pixel on axis 2 (usually Dec in degrees)
CRVAL2.comment: Axis 2 coordinate value at reference point

CTYPE1.description: Coordinate type for axis 1 (e.g., RA---TAN, GLON-AIT)

CTYPE2.description: Coordinate type for axis 2 (e.g., DEC--TAN, GLAT-AIT)

CUNIT1.description: Physical unit for axis 1 coordinate (e.g., deg)

CUNIT2.description: Physical unit for axis 2 coordinate (e.g., deg)

CDELT1.comment: Axis 1 coordinate increment at reference point

CDELT2.comment: Axis 2 coordinate increment at reference point

CD1_1.description: Coordinate transformation matrix element (1,1). Encodes rotation and scale.

PC1_1.description: Linear transformation matrix element (1,1) — alternative to CDi_j

RADESYS.description: Celestial coordinate reference frame (e.g., ICRS, FK5)
RADESYS.comment: Name of the coordinate reference frame

EQUINOX.description: Equinox of celestial coordinate system (e.g., 2000.0 for J2000)

LONPOLE.description: Native longitude of the celestial pole (degrees)
LONPOLE.comment: Native longitude of the celestial pole

LATPOLE.description: Native latitude of the celestial pole (degrees)
LATPOLE.comment: Native latitude of the celestial pole

S_REGION.description: Spatial footprint of the observation in STC-S (IVOA) format
S_REGION.comment: spatial extent of the observation, footprint

SUBARRAY.description: Subarray name (FULL if full frame, or named subarray up to 9 chars)

SUBSTRT1.description: Starting pixel in the full science frame axis 1 direction

SUBSTRT2.description: Starting pixel in the full science frame axis 2 direction

SUBSIZE1.description: Number of pixels in the subarray axis 1 direction
SUBSIZE1.comment: Number of pixels in axis 1 direction

SUBSIZE2.description: Number of pixels in the subarray axis 2 direction
SUBSIZE2.comment: Number of pixels in axis 2 direction

FASTAXIS.description: Axis and direction of fast detector readout (±1 or ±2)

SLOWAXIS.description: Axis and direction of slow detector readout (±1 or ±2)

APERNAME.description: S&OC PRD aperture name used for telescope pointing

PPS_APER.description: Original aperture name as supplied by PPS

NUMDTHPT.description: Total number of points in the entire dither pattern
NUMDTHPT.comment: Total number of points in dither pattern

XOFFSET.description: X offset from pattern starting position in SI ideal frame (arcsec)
XOFFSET.comment: [arcsec] X offset in SI ideal coordinate frame

YOFFSET.description: Y offset from pattern starting position in SI ideal frame (arcsec)
YOFFSET.comment: [arcsec] Y offset in SI ideal coordinate frame

PATTTYPE.description: Dither pattern type (e.g., FULL, INTRAMODULE, INTRASCA, NONE, CYCLING)

PATTSIZE.description: Primary dither pattern size (NONE, SMALL, MEDIUM, LARGE)

PATTSTRT.description: Starting point in the dither cycling pattern (1–311 for MIRI)

PATTNPTS.description: Number of points in CYCLING dither pattern (≥3 for MIRI)
PATTNPTS.comment: Number of points in CYCLING pattern

NUMDSETS.comment: Number of 4-point sets in dither set list

DSETSTRT.description: Starting set number of the 4-point dither sets (1–10)
DSETSTRT.comment: Starting 4-point set in dither set list

DITHOPFR.description: Dither optimization type: POINT-SOURCE or EXTENDED-SOURCE

MRSPRCHN.description: MIRI MRS channel for which dither is optimized

NOD_TYPE.description: NIRSpec MSA nod pattern type (NONE, 2-, 3-, or 5-SHUTTER-SLITLET)

PRIDTYPE.description: NIRCam primary dither specification with number of points

PRIDTPTS.description: Number of points in FGS primary dither pattern
PRIDTPTS.comment: Number of points in primary dither pattern

SUBPXPAT.description: Subpixel dither pattern type (STANDARD, SMALL-GRID-DITHER, NONE)

SUBPXPTS.description: Number of points in subpixel dither pattern
SUBPXPTS.comment: Number of points in subpixel dither pattern

SMGRDPAT.description: NIRCam small grid dither pattern name

NRIMDTPT.description: NIRISS direct image dither number of points
NRIMDTPT.comment: Number of points in direct image dither pattern

SPATNSTP.description: MIRI LRS number of steps in the spatial direction

SPATSTEP.description: MIRI LRS distance between steps in the spatial direction (arcsec)

SPAT_NUM.description: MIRI LRS position number within spatial steps

SPECNSTP.description: MIRI LRS number of steps in the spectral direction

SPECSTEP.description: MIRI LRS distance between steps in the spectral direction (arcsec)

SPEC_NUM.description: MIRI LRS position number within spectral steps

SPTOFFST.description: MIRI LRS spatial offset from pattern starting position (arcsec)

SPCOFFST.description: MIRI LRS spectral offset from pattern starting position (arcsec)

VSTSTART.description: Observatory UTC time when the visit started

VISITSTA.description: Status of the visit (e.g., SUCCESSFUL, DATALOSS)

NEXPOSUR.description: Total number of planned exposures in the visit
NEXPOSUR.comment: Total number of planned exposures in visit

INTARGET.description: At least one exposure in the visit is internally targeted
INTARGET.comment: At least one exposure in visit is internal

TARGOOPP.description: Visit scheduled as a target of opportunity
TARGOOPP.comment: Visit scheduled as target of opportunity

TSOVISIT.description: Visit uses Time Series Observation special requirement

EXP_ONLY.description: Exposure taken through special commanding without SI configuration

CROWDFLD.description: FGSes operating in a crowded star field
CROWDFLD.comment: Are the FGSes in a crowded field?

GS_ORDER.description: Index of guide star within the list of selected guide stars
GS_ORDER.comment: guide star index within selected guide star list

GSSTRTTM.description: UTC time when guide star activity started
GSSTRTTM.comment: UTC time when guide star activity started

GSENDTIM.description: UTC time when guide star activity completed
GSENDTIM.comment: UTC time when guide star activity completed

GDSTARID.description: Guide Star Catalog 2 identifier (10 character, base-36)

GS_RA.description: ICRS right ascension of the guide star (degrees)

GS_DEC.description: ICRS declination of the guide star (degrees)

GS_URA.description: ICRS right ascension uncertainty of the guide star (arcsec)

GS_UDEC.description: ICRS declination uncertainty of the guide star (arcsec)

GS_MAG.description: Guide star magnitude in FGS detector

GS_V3_PA.description: V3 position angle of the guide star at the guide star location (degrees)
GS_V3_PA.comment: [deg] guide star V3 Position Angle for science

PCS_MODE.description: Pointing Control System mode (FINEGUIDE, COARSE, TRACK, MOVING, NONE)

VISITEND.description: UTC time when the visit ended
VISITEND.comment: UTC time when the visit ended

BARTDELT.description: Calculated barycentric time correction from UTC (seconds)

BSTRTIME.comment: [d] Barycentric exposure start time in MJD

BENDTIME.comment: [d] Barycentric exposure end time in MJD

BMIDTIME.comment: [d] Barycentric exposure mid time in MJD

HELIDELT.description: Calculated heliocentric time correction from UTC (seconds)

HSTRTIME.comment: [d] Heliocentric exposure start time in MJD

HENDTIME.comment: [d] Heliocentric exposure end time in MJD

HMIDTIME.comment: [d] Heliocentric exposure mid time in MJD

ASNPOOL.description: Name of the association pool file used as pipeline input

ASNTABLE.description: Name of the association table from which this product was created
ASNTABLE.comment: Name of the Association Generator Table

BKGLEVEL.description: Overall background signal level computed by the skymatch pipeline step

BKGSUB.description: Background signal from BKGLEVEL has been subtracted (T or F)

MASTERBG.description: Name of the 1-D master background spectrum file used in pipeline

FILETYPE.description: Type of data in the file (e.g., SCIENCE, CALIBRATION)
FILETYPE.comment: Type of data in the file

ROOTNAME.description: Root name of the observation set
ROOTNAME.comment: Root name of the observation set

IMAGETYP.description: Type of exposure identifier (e.g., BIAS, DARK, FLAT, OBJECT)

CAL_VCS.description: Calibration software repository version (git hash or tag)

CRDS_VER.description: Version of the CRDS client software used for reference file selection
CRDS_VER.comment: Version of CRDS file selection software used

CRDS_CTX.description: Version of the CRDS context (PMAP) controlling reference file selection
CRDS_CTX.comment: CRDS context (.pmap) used to select ref files

OSS_VER.description: Version number of the Observatory Scheduling Software

PIXAR_A2.description: Nominal pixel area in arcsec squared

HGA_MOVE.description: High Gain Antenna moved during data collection
HGA_MOVE.comment: High Gain Antenna moved during data collection

PWFSEET.description: Exposure end time from the previous WFS exposure (MJD)
PWFSEET.comment: [d] previous WFS exposure end time in MJD

NWFSEST.description: Exposure start time from the next WFS exposure (MJD)
NWFSEST.comment: [d] next WFS exposure start time in MJD

ERRTYPE.description: Type of values in the error array (ERR, IERR, VAR, IVAR)

FA1VALUE.description: Requested focus actuator 1 absolute position value

FA2VALUE.description: Requested focus actuator 2 absolute position value

FA3VALUE.description: Requested focus actuator 3 absolute position value

FCSRLPOS.description: NIRSpec RMA relative position in motor steps (−18400 to +18400)

RMA_POS.description: NIRSpec Refocus Mechanism Assembly latest hall-position sensor value

ROIS.description: Radius of the region of interest in spatial dimensions (arcsec)

ROIW.description: Radius of the region of interest in wavelength dimension (arcsec)

WPOWER.description: Weighting power controlling distance weighting for IFU spaxels

WTYPE.description: Type of weighting used when combining IFU point cloud fluxes

SCATFILE.description: Source catalog filename generated by the source_catalog pipeline step

TCATFILE.description: Tweakreg catalog filename used for image alignment

COMMENT.description: Free-form comment text. Multiple COMMENT keywords can appear in a header.

HISTORY.description: Processing history entry. Multiple HISTORY keywords can appear.

PHOTFLAM.description: Inverse sensitivity: flux density of a source with constant F_lambda that produces 1 count/s (erg/s/cm2/Angstrom). HST-specific.

PHOTFNU.description: Inverse sensitivity: flux density per count rate (Jy*sec)

ORIENTAT.description: Image orientation: position angle of Y axis (degrees, east of north). HST legacy.
ORIENTAT.comment: Position angle of image Y axis (deg E of N)

TSTART.description: Observation start time (BJD - 2457000 for TESS, BJD for Kepler)

BJDREFI.description: Integer part of Barycentric Julian Date reference

BJDREFF.description: Fractional part of Barycentric Julian Date reference

LIVETIME.description: Accumulated on-source live time (seconds). Used in X-ray missions.

CROWDSAP.description: Crowding metric — ratio of target flux to total flux in aperture

HIERARCH.description: ESO HIERARCH convention — allows keywords longer than 8 characters

CHECKSUM.description: HDU checksum (ASCII encoded complement for verification)

FPE_SIDE.description: Active side for MIRI Focal Plane Electronics (A or B)
FPE_SIDE.comment: Active side for FPE (A or B)

ICE_SIDE.description: Active side for MIRI Instrument Control Electronics (A or B)
ICE_SIDE.comment: Active side for ICE (A or B)

V2_REF.description: Telescope V2 coordinate of the reference point (arcsec)
V2_REF.comment: [arcsec] Telescope V2 coord of reference point

V3_REF.description: Telescope V3 coordinate of the reference point (arcsec)
V3_REF.comment: [arcsec] Telescope V3 coord of reference point

V3I_YANG.description: Direction angle of V3 axis in Y (degrees)

RA_REF.description: Right Ascension of the WCS reference point (degrees)
RA_REF.comment: [deg] Right Ascension of the reference point

DEC_REF.description: Declination of the WCS reference point (degrees)

ROLL_REF.description: V3 roll angle at the reference point (degrees, N over E)
ROLL_REF.comment: [deg] V3 roll angle at ref point, N over E

DISPAXIS.description: Dispersion axis direction (1 = along rows, 2 = along columns)

SPECSYS.description: Spectral reference frame (e.g., BARYCENT, HELIOCEN, TOPOCENT)

EPH_TIME.description: MJD time of position and velocity vectors
EPH_TIME.comment: [d] MJD time of position and velocity vectors

JWST_X.description: Barycentric JWST X coordinate at MJD-AVG (km)
JWST_X.comment: [km] barycentric JWST X coordinate at MJD-AVG

JWST_Y.description: Barycentric JWST Y coordinate at MJD-AVG (km)
JWST_Y.comment: [km] barycentric JWST Y coordinate at MJD-AVG

JWST_Z.description: Barycentric JWST Z coordinate at MJD-AVG (km)
JWST_Z.comment: [km] barycentric JWST Z coordinate at MJD-AVG

JWST_DX.description: Barycentric JWST X velocity at MJD-AVG (km/s)
JWST_DX.comment: [km/s] barycentric JWST X velocity at MJD-AVG

JWST_DY.description: Barycentric JWST Y velocity at MJD-AVG (km/s)
JWST_DY.comment: [km/s] barycentric JWST Y velocity at MJD-AVG

JWST_DZ.description: Barycentric JWST Z velocity at MJD-AVG (km/s)
JWST_DZ.comment: [km/s] barycentric JWST Z velocity at MJD-AVG

OBSGEO-X.description: Geocentric JWST X coordinate at MJD-AVG (m)
OBSGEO-X.comment: [m] geocentric JWST X coordinate at MJD-AVG

OBSGEO-Y.description: Geocentric JWST Y coordinate at MJD-AVG (m)
OBSGEO-Y.comment: [m] geocentric JWST Y coordinate at MJD-AVG

OBSGEO-Z.description: Geocentric JWST Z coordinate at MJD-AVG (m)
OBSGEO-Z.comment: [m] geocentric JWST Z coordinate at MJD-AVG

TDB-BEG.description: TDB time of exposure start in MJD
TDB-BEG.comment: [d] TDB time of exposure start in MJD

TDB-MID.description: TDB time of exposure mid-point in MJD
TDB-MID.comment: [d] TDB time of exposure mid-point in MJD

TDB-END.description: TDB time of exposure end in MJD
TDB-END.comment: [d] TDB time of exposure end in MJD

END.description: Marks the end of the header block (no value)
